title: Staff Meeting — All Hands
description: Monthly all-hands meeting. Agenda: Q2 review, upcoming campaigns, team updates.

title: AIS Open House
description: Two-day open house event. All campuses. Photography and video team on standby.

title: Content Planning Session
description: Plan July content calendar. Bring campaign briefs and deadlines.

title: TEDx Committee Meeting
description: Review speaker lineup, venue logistics, and marketing collateral.

title: Yearbook Photo Deadline
description: Final deadline for all yearbook portrait submissions. No extensions.

title: Social Media Analytics Review
description: Monthly review of FB, IG, TikTok performance across all pages.

title: Campus Tour — New Students
description: Guided campus tour for incoming students. Photo/video coverage needed.

title: Q3 Campaign Kickoff
description: Launch planning for Q3 campaigns. Review budget allocations and creative briefs.

title: Video Production Workshop
description: Internal training session on new editing techniques and equipment.
